zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Douglas of Glenbervie於大約1470年出生在蘇格蘭金加迪爾格倫維時，他的父親Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus22歲，母親Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus21歲。他和Lady Elizabeth Auchinleck至少有1個兒子。他去世於1513年9月9日在英國諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年44歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾格倫維。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Douglas of Glenbervie于大约1470年出生在苏格兰金加迪爾格倫維时，他的父亲Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus22岁，母亲Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus21岁。他和Lady Elizabeth Auchinleck至少有1个儿子。他去世于1513年9月9日在英国諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年44岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰金加迪爾格倫維。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Douglas of Glenbervie was born about 1470, in Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland, his father, Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus, was 22 and his mother, Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus, was 21. He had at least 1 son with Lady Elizabeth Auchinleck. He died on 9 September 1513, in Branxton, Northumberland, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Douglas of Glenbervie est né environ 1470, à Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Écosse, son père, Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Lady Elizabeth Auchinleck. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1513, à Branxton, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Douglas of Glenbervie um 1470 in Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus 22 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus 21. Er hatte mit Lady Elizabeth Auchinleck mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 9. September 1513 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Branxton, Northumberland, England und wurde in Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Douglas of Glenbervie è nato il circa 1470 nel Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Lady Elizabeth Auchinleck. Morì il 9 settembre 1513, nel Branxton, Northumberland, England, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Douglas of Glenbervieが約1470年にスコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアグレンバーヴィで生まれた時，父Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angusは22歳，母Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angusは21歳であった。彼はLady Elizabeth Auchinleckとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1513年9月9日にイギリスノースウンバーランドブランクストンで44歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアグレンバーヴィにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Douglas of Glenbervie(이)가 대략 1470년 스컷랜드 킨카딘실르 글렌버비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Lady Elizabeth Auchinleck(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1513년 9월 9일 영국 노르스벌랜드 브랜스턴에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르 글렌버비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Douglas of Glenbervie nasceu aproximadamente 1470, em Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland, seu pai, Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Lady Elizabeth Auchinleck. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1513, em Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Douglas of Glenbervie родился около 1470 г. в местности гленбирви, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus, 21. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Lady Elizabeth Auchinleck. Он умер 9 сентября 1513 г. в местности бранкстон, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности гленбирви, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Douglas of Glenbervie nació aproximadamente 1470, en Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland, su papá, Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Lady Elizabeth Auchinleck. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1513, en Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
